creator: rueter@ejz.de
text:
Hi,

I installed the update from 23.1.11_1 to 23.7 (opnsense 13.1 to 13.2) on one of our firewalls yesterday and had problems with the broadcom P225P network card driver.

The problem only occurs when vlans are assigned, normal operation without vlans is no problem. 

bnxt0: HWRM_CFA_L2_FILTER_ALLOC command returned INVALID_Params error

I couldn't get it to work so I had to roll back.
